purpose: Project-owned X account setup kit for 0guard launch and HackQuest updates.

account.bio: Pre-wallet firewall for AI agents. Source-linked exploit intelligence, deterministic policy receipts, and 0G-verifiable proof before any signer can act.
account.headerImageRecommendation: Use the proof-page screenshot or a 1500x500 crop of the workbench showing the agent -> 0guard -> wallet flow.

pinnedPost.text:
Introducing 0guard: a pre-wallet firewall for AI agents.

It checks intent, calldata, policy, and source-linked exploit intelligence before a wallet is ever asked to sign.

Built on 0G with a public mainnet receipt anchor.

Demo: https://arigatoexpress.github.io/0guard/hackathon-0g/assets/0guard-hackquest-demo-final.mp4
Proof: https://arigatoexpress.github.io/0guard/hackathon-0g/

#0GHackathon #BuildOn0G

followUpPosts.text:
The important part: 0guard is proof-first, not wallet-custody theater.

- 28/28 April 2026 incidents source-linked
- 27/28 incident-derived patterns matched
- 1 research-only gap held back until public evidence improves
- 0G mainnet PolicyReceiptAnchor proof

No browser signing. No broadcasts. No fund movement.

The cross-chain story is now a guardrail story.

0guard treats x402, Virtuals/Base, EVM networks, Lighter exchange/API intents, Celestia, CCIP, LayerZero, and Wormhole as read-only policy surfaces first.

A checkpoint before the wallet, not a launch button.

Autonomous agents will move faster than humans can manually review every approval, bridge call, or admin action.

0guard moves the security decision earlier: intent first, signer later.
